paper_title: Pollen-food allergy syndrome and component sensitization in adolescents: A Japanese population-based study

methods.description: A questionnaire was administered to caregivers to evaluate oral allergy syndrome (OAS) in adolescents aged 13 years, focusing on reactions to fruits and vegetables.

steps.description: A questionnaire was given to caregivers to evaluate OAS for children and fruits at 13 years of age.
steps.searchable_summary: administer questionnaire to caregivers about OAS in adolescents
outputs: responses about OAS symptoms and dietary habits

steps.description: The survey included questions about symptoms after eating fruits and vegetables, specific foods consumed, and dietary habits regarding raw consumption.
steps.searchable_summary: collect data on symptoms, specific foods, and raw consumption habits
outputs: detailed data on symptoms and food consumption
